verdict.evidence: The output faithfully reflects the source without merging independent facts into false causal or combined claims. The phrase 'one of the objects — identified as a drone' adds a minor clarifying parenthetical linking the detected objects to the drones, but this relationship is clearly implied in the source (objects were detected, drones crashed), so it does not constitute a composite conflation. No causal connectors (because, caused, led to, due to, resulting in) are used to fabricate relationships not present in the source.
